name: Procurement + Receiving
manual_mismatches: Session 5 prerequisites used write-only wording where read-vs-write behavior is split in backend/frontend permissions.
Suppliers entry included SUPPLIER_IS_INACTIVE despite suppliers CRUD endpoint only enforcing name-required on create and inactive checks occurring in purchase flows.
Purchases entry used unsupported ITEMS_ARE_REQUIRED and UNIT_PRICE_BELOW_MINIMUM_ALLOWED mappings not thrown by purchases controller/service in this flow.
Receiving entry missed backend errors for offline submit restriction, missing source id, override reason, variant-not-on-po, and batch-not-found paths.
Supplier returns entry missed receiving-line linkage errors (line not found, line/source mismatch).
Session 5 Swahili entries still had English prerequisite lines.
Permission prerequisites exposed technical codes without user-first language.
manual_fixes_applied: Updated EN+SW Session 5 prerequisites to user-first wording with permission codes in parentheses.
Split Session 5 prerequisites into view/read vs action/write permission guidance where applicable.
Replaced incorrect suppliers/purchases error mappings with backend-aligned error sets.
Expanded receiving errors to include backend-thrown validation and operational constraints.
Expanded supplier-returns errors to include receiving-line integrity failures.
Translated remaining Session 5 Swahili prerequisite lines to full Swahili.
Synchronized docs manuals to runtime copies in frontend data.
